Class Player

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.players.Player
Direct Known Subclasses:
BotPlayer
public class Player extends Object
Represents a player in the game of Whist.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected Hand
    hand
    The hand of this player.

    Description
    Player(String name)
    A basic constructor for a player.

    Method
    Description
    String
    findAutonomousCard(Suit leadSuit)
    A method for getting the card to play from an autonomous player.
    ArrayList<String>
    getAllowedHandCards(Suit leadSuit)
    Returns the strings of all legally allowed cards given the trick's lead suit.

    A method for getting the bid from an autonomous player.

    A simple getter that finds the cards in this player's hand.

    A simple getter for the score of this player.

    A method for receiving a hand, a list of 13 cards.
    boolean

    A method for knowing if a Player requires some input from the CLI.

    A method for playing a given card.

    A simple helper method for checking if an individual player name is valid.

    A method for checking if the players are valid.

    A simple setter for setting of the name of this player.

  • Field Details

    • hand

      protected Hand hand
      The hand of this player.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String name)
      A basic constructor for a player.

  • Method Details

    • updateScore

      public void updateScore(int points)
      A method for updating the score for a player.

      Note: This can be negative because players can lose points when they lose.

    • giveHand

      public void giveHand(ArrayList<Card> hand)
      A method for receiving a hand, a list of 13 cards.

    • playCard

      public Card playCard(String card, Suit currentSuit) throws IllegalArgumentException, IllegalStateException
      A method for playing a given card.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - The given card isn't found in this hand.
      IllegalStateException - The hand is empty.

    • getNextPlayer

      public static Player getNextPlayer(ArrayList<Player> players, Player currentPlayer)
      A simple getter finding the next player in line to play or bid.
      Parameters:
      players - The players playing.
      currentPlayer - The player that is currently playing.
      Returns:
      The player playing after the current player.

    • playersValid

      public static boolean playersValid(ArrayList<String> players)
      A method for checking if the players are valid.
      Parameters:
      players - The names of the players.
      Returns:
      true if the players are valid, false otherwise.

    • playerNameValid

      public static boolean playerNameValid(String player)
      A simple helper method for checking if an individual player name is valid.
      Parameters:
      player - The name of the player.
      Returns:
      true if the player name is valid, false otherwise.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      A simple getter for the name of this player.

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      A simple getter for the score of this player.

    • isAutonomous

      public boolean isAutonomous()
      A method for knowing if a Player requires some input from the CLI.

    • getAutonomousBid

      public BidType getAutonomousBid()
      A method for getting the bid from an autonomous player. By default, a player is not autonomous and this throws an exception.
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - if the player is not autonomous.

    • findAutonomousCard

      public String findAutonomousCard(Suit leadSuit)
      A method for getting the card to play from an autonomous player. By default, a player is not autonomous and this throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      leadSuit - The suit currently leading the trick.
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - if the player is not autonomous.

    • getHandCards

      public String[] getHandCards()
      A simple getter that finds the cards in this player's hand.

    • getAllowedHandCards

      public ArrayList<String> getAllowedHandCards(Suit leadSuit)
      Returns the strings of all legally allowed cards given the trick's lead suit.

    • setName

      protected void setName(String name)
      A simple setter for setting of the name of this player.

    • setScore

      protected void setScore(int score)
      A simple setter for setting the score of this player.
